sub_pixel_system.notes: Flight simulator - sub-pixel precision not applicable to aircraft physics simulation

special_mechanics.name: Flight Dynamics
special_mechanics.description: X-Plane uses blade element theory for realistic aircraft flight physics modeling. Game is FAA-certified professional version physics.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - X-Plane is a flight simulator, not a platformer. Traditional character movement parameters (walk speed, jump, gravity, acceleration) do not apply. Instead, the simulation uses realistic aerodynamic physics based on blade element theory. No documented movement/jump mechanics data available as this is an aircraft simulation paradigm.
